Title: Register a new user
Step Action: Launch the URL https://demowebshop.tricentis.com/ in the browser.
Click Register link in the top-right corner of the page.
Select Male radio button.
Enter First Name (John) in First Name field.
Enter Last Name (Smith) in Last Name field.
Enter Email (johnsmith@test.com) in Email field.
Enter Password (xxx) in Password field.
Enter Confirm Password (xxx) in Confirm Password field.
Click Register button.
Verify confirmation message 'Your registration completed' appears on screen.
Step Expected: The system displays the registration success message.

Step Action: Click Logout link in the top-right corner of the page.

Title: Search product after login
Step Action: Launch the URL https://demowebshop.tricentis.com/ in the browser.
Provide valid login credentials (Email: johnsmith@test.com, Password: xxx) and log in.
Step Expected: User logs into the application successfully.

Step Action: Enter product name (Laptop) in the search field at the top center of the page.
Click Search button.
Verify product search results are displayed.
Step Expected: The system displays a list of products matching the search keyword.

Step Action: Click Logout link in the top-right corner of the page.

Title: Place an order successfully
Step Action: Launch the URL https://demowebshop.tricentis.com/ in the browser.

Step Action: Select Shipping Method (Ground)
